chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.692 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.4116/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.4117/2025 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 17.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Kamran Khan, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Waqar Ahmed son of Muhammad Azam seeks pre-arrest bail in FIR No.448/2024, registered at P.S. Aziz Bhatti for offence under Section 320, 337-G, 322, PPC. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant is innocent and he has been falsely implicated in this case due to mala fide intentions and ulterior motives; that applicant/ accused is law abiding citizen and intends to surrender before the concerned Court but he feels apprehension of his arrest at the hands of police, hence he needs some protection to enable him to appear before the Court concerned. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to applicant/accused above named, for a period of three days from today, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- (Rupees twenty five thousand) each and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the investigation/trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of three days from today or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear, in case, applicant/accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of three days from today or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear, in case, applicant/accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited. The instant criminal bail application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
